page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, and the system is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks position this instance in the lower tiers for compute and memory operations. Single-core and multi-core CPU performance tests, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, consistently rank in the bottom 25%. Similarly, memory read bandwidth is weak, though memory write bandwidth for large blocks achieves an average rating. Cryptographic and compression workloads, including gzip and bzip3, show poor performance, placing in the bottom 10%.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the shared CPU allocation and modest performance profile make this instance suitable for budget-conscious, non-critical workloads. It is best utilized for lightweight applications, basic web serving, development environments, or small-scale database testing where high-throughput compute and storage performance are not required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 4 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based instance features a shared CPU allocation and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results indicate weak performance across most compute, memory, and compression tests, with single-core and multi-core scores generally falling into the bottom 25%. While memory write bandwidth remains average, database operations and text processing show poor performance. Consequently, this instance is best suited for low-intensity workloads, such as basic web serving, development environments, and lightweight testing, offering a cost-effective option for resource-dense, non-critical applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8269CY CPU. It offers a budget-friendly option for lightweight web serving and development workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 2.5 GHz Intel Xeon processor for basic workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly general-purpose instance featuring balanced memory-to-CPU ratios for lightweight development and basic web serving workloads.

No local storage or GPU hardware included
Average performance for large-block memory write operations
